title: Assign multi-factor authentication for SailPoint privileged user accounts
remediation:
1. Review the list of exposed entities to discover which of your SailPoint privileged user accounts do not have any MFA method assigned.
2. Assign and enforce a multi-factor authentication (MFA) method for all the privileged accounts.
remediationImpact: This report lists any SailPoint privileged accounts that do not have any multi-factor authentication (MFA) methods assigned.
